title: Super Smash Bros.
edition_pinned: Super Smash Bros. Nintendo UK Virtual Console (Wii) listing (2009 re-release), observed 2026-07-13; row describes the 1999 Nintendo 64 Super Smash Bros. design.
moat: Rising damage and blast zones convert every hit into contested position instead of draining a health bar.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: Shared movement and ring-out rules make stages, items, and twelve compact kits produce many multiplayer matchups.
exemplar_rationale: Defines platform fighting through positional knockback, readable chaos, and simultaneous four-player rounds.

evidence.claim: Nintendo UK Virtual Console product page listed Category: Fighting.
